vBRIEFInfo.description: Story B of #1378 -- build skill recognizes the structured consent token; swarm skill populates it.

plan.title: feat(skills): recognize + populate ## Allocation context consent token (#1378 Story B)

narratives.Description: Teach skills/deft-directive-build/SKILL.md Step 0 to recognize the structured `## Allocation context` section (from Story A) as the canonical consent-token recognition path, keeping the #1371 prose carve-out as the fallback for pre-elevation dispatches; and teach skills/deft-directive-swarm/SKILL.md Phase 3 (Launch) to populate the section in every dispatched prompt (cohort + solo).
narratives.UserStory: As a swarm-dispatched build agent, I want to recognize a structured allocation-context section as the consent token, so I process my cohort vBRIEFs without re-prompting for batching approval mid-cohort even on weaker models or context-pressure sessions.
narratives.ImplementationPlan: 1. In skills/deft-directive-build/SKILL.md Step 0, add a `!` bullet: when the dispatch envelope's `## Allocation context` reports dispatch_kind: swarm-cohort with a non-null allocation_plan_id and batching_rationale, the consent token is satisfied; process each cohort_vbriefs entry sequentially under the checkpoint-commit + task scope:complete discipline. Keep the #1371 prose carve-out as the explicit fallback when the section is absent. 2. In skills/deft-directive-swarm/SKILL.md Phase 3 (Launch), add a `!` step requiring the dispatcher to populate `## Allocation context` in every dispatched prompt (cohort AND solo), referencing the Story A schema. 3. Add content tests under tests/content/ pinning the build-skill recognition prose and the swarm-skill population step. 4. CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] entry referencing #1378.
narratives.Traces: Traces to GitHub issue #1378 Story B. Recognition semantics derive from #1371's merged build-skill carve-out wording (Step 0).

items.title: Build skill Step 0 recognizes the structured field (prose carve-out stays fallback)

narrative.Acceptance: skills/deft-directive-build/SKILL.md Step 0 references the `## Allocation context` section as the canonical consent-token recognition path (swarm-cohort + non-null allocation_plan_id + batching_rationale), and explicitly keeps the #1371 prose carve-out as the fallback when the section is absent.
narrative.Traces: Traces to #1378 Story B -- build skill recognition.

items.title: Swarm skill Phase 3 populates the section on every dispatch

narrative.Acceptance: skills/deft-directive-swarm/SKILL.md Phase 3 (Launch) carries a `!` step requiring `## Allocation context` to be populated in every dispatched prompt (cohort + solo), citing the Story A schema.
narrative.Traces: Traces to #1378 Story B -- swarm skill population.

narrative.Acceptance: tests/content/ assertions verify the build-skill recognition prose and the swarm-skill population step; pass under task check.
narrative.Traces: Traces to #1378 Story B -- content tests.

references.title: Issue #1378: first-class allocation-plan reference in dispatch envelope (post #1371 deterministic-tier enabler)

expected_outputs: build SKILL Step 0 recognizes the structured consent token with #1371 prose fallback
swarm SKILL Phase 3 populates ## Allocation context on every dispatch
